questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解決方案架構師需要在 AWS 雲端中託管高效能運算 (HPC) 工作負載。此工作負載將在數百個 Amazon EC2 執行個體上運行，並且需要並行存取共用檔案系統以實現大型資料集的分散式處理。將同時跨多個實例存取資料集。工作負載要求訪問時延在1ms以內。處理完成後，工程師將需要存取資料集進行手動後處理。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A solutions architect needs to host a high performance computing (HPC) workload in the AWS Cloud. The workload will run on hundreds of Amazon EC2 instances and will require parallel access to a shared file system to enable distributed processing of large datasets. Datasets will be accessed across multiple instances simultaneously. The workload requires access latency within 1 ms. After processing has completed, engineers will need access to the dataset for manual postprocessing. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 作為共用檔案系統。從 Amazon EFS 存取資料集。
A.en: Use Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) as a shared file system. Access the dataset from Amazon EFS.

B.zh: 掛載 Amazon S3 儲存桶以用作共用檔案系統。直接從 S3 儲存桶執行後處理。
B.en: Mount an Amazon S3 bucket to serve as the shared file system. Perform postprocessing directly from the S3 bucket.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon FSx for Lustre 作為共用檔案系統。將檔案系統連結到 Amazon S3 儲存桶以進行後處理。
C.en: Use Amazon FSx for Lustre as a shared file system. Link the file system to an Amazon S3 bucket for postprocessing.

D.zh: 設定 AWS Resource Access Manager 以共用 Amazon S3 儲存桶，以便可以將其掛載到所有執行個體以進行處理和後處理。
D.en: Configure AWS Resource Access Manager to share an Amazon S3 bucket so that it can be mounted to all instances for processing and postprocessing.

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項分析：Amazon EFS是一個分散式檔案系統，適合處理一般檔案儲存需求，但其存取延遲通常為毫秒級別，無法保證1ms延遲要求。另外，在高效能運算場景下，EFS 的效能可能不如 FSx for Lustre。
A.en: Incorrect. Use Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) as the shared file system. Access the dataset from Amazon EFS. Analysis: Amazon EFS is a distributed file system suitable for handling general file storage needs, but its access latency is usually at the millisecond level and the 1ms latency requirement cannot be guaranteed. Additionally, the performance of EFS may not be as good as FSx for Luster in high-performance computing scenarios.

B.zh: 錯誤。將 Amazon S3 儲存桶裝載為共用檔案系統。直接從 S3 儲存桶進行後處理。分析：Amazon S3是一個物件儲存服務，不是檔案系統，不能直接掛載到EC2實例上作為共享檔案系統。另外，S3的存取延遲通常在幾十毫秒量級，遠高於1ms的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Mount an Amazon S3 bucket as a shared file system. Post-process directly from S3 bucket. Analysis: Amazon S3 is an object storage service, not a file system, and cannot be directly mounted to an EC2 instance as a shared file system. In addition, the access delay of S3 is usually on the order of tens of milliseconds, which is much higher than the 1ms requirement.

C.zh: 正確。此選項分析：Amazon FSx for Lustre是一款專為高效能運算而設計的檔案系統，支援小於1ms的存取延遲，並且可以與Amazon S3集成，方便後處理資料的儲存和存取。此選項完全滿足題目要求。
C.en: Correct. Use Amazon FSx for Luster as a shared file system. Link the file system to an Amazon S3 bucket for post-processing. Analysis: Amazon FSx for Luster is a file system designed for high-performance computing, supports access latency of less than 1ms, and can be integrated with Amazon S3 to facilitate the storage and access of post-processing data. This option fully meets the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。設定 AWS Resource Access Manager 以共用可掛載至所有執行個體以進行處理和後處理的 Amazon S3 儲存桶。分析：AWS Resource Access Manager（RAM）用於跨帳戶共享資源，但S3仍然是物件儲存服務，不能直接掛載為檔案系統。另外，S3的存取延遲無法滿足1ms的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Configure AWS Resource Access Manager to share an Amazon S3 bucket that can be mounted to all instances for processing and post-processing. Analysis: AWS Resource Access Manager (RAM) is used to share resources across accounts, but S3 is still an object storage service and cannot be directly mounted as a file system. In addition, S3's access latency cannot meet the 1ms requirement.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用 Amazon FSx for Lustre 作為共用檔案系統。將檔案系統連結到 Amazon S3 儲存桶以進行後處理。
answer_text.en: C. Use Amazon FSx for Lustre as a shared file system. Link the file system to an Amazon S3 bucket for postprocessing.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項分析：Amazon FSx for Lustre是一款專為高效能運算而設計的檔案系統，支援小於1ms的存取延遲，並且可以與Amazon S3集成，方便後處理資料的儲存和存取。此選項完全滿足題目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Use Amazon FSx for Luster as a shared file system. Link the file system to an Amazon S3 bucket for post-processing. Analysis: Amazon FSx for Luster is a file system designed for high-performance computing, supports access latency of less than 1ms, and can be integrated with Amazon S3 to facilitate the storage and access of post-processing data. This option fully meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家遊戲公司正在建立具有 IP 語音功能的應用程式。該應用程式將為世界各地的用戶提供流量。該應用程式需要具有跨 AWS 區域的自動故障轉移的高可用性。該公司希望在不依賴用戶設備上的 IP 位址快取的情況下最大限度地減少用戶的延遲。解決方案架構師應該怎麼做才能滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A gaming company is building an application with Voice over IP capabilities. The application will serve traffic to users across the world. The application needs to be highly available with an automated failover across AWS Regions. The company wants to minimize the latency of users without relying on IP address caching on user devices. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 AWS Global Accelerator 進行運作狀況檢查。
A.en: Use AWS Global Accelerator with health checks.

B.zh: 將 Amazon Route 53 與地理位置路由策略結合使用。
B.en: Use Amazon Route 53 with a geolocation routing policy.

C.zh: 建立包含多個來源的 Amazon CloudFront 分配。
C.en: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution that includes multiple origins.

D.zh: 建立使用基於路徑的路由的應用程式負載平衡器。
D.en: Create an Application Load Balancer that uses path-based routing.

A.zh: 正確。AWS Global Accelerator 是一項專為優化全球用戶流量而設計的服務。它透過對任何區域使用靜態 IP 位址來減少延遲，並支援跨區域的自動故障轉移。健康檢查功能可確保流量路由到健康的端點。這個選項完全滿足了問題的要求，包括高可用性、低延遲和自動故障轉移。
A.en: Correct. AWS Global Accelerator is a service specifically designed to optimize global user traffic. It reduces latency by using static IP addresses for any region and supports automatic failover across regions. Health check functionality ensures traffic is routed to healthy endpoints. this option fully meet the requirements of the question, including high availability, low latency and automatic failover.

B.zh: 錯誤。雖然 Route 53 的地理位置路由策略可以根據使用者的位置將流量路由到最近的區域，但它依賴於 DNS 解析，並且可能會受到用戶設備的 IP 位址快取的影響。 Stripe-free完全滿足「最小化延遲、不依賴IP位址快取」的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Although Route 53's geo-location routing policy can route traffic to the nearest area based on the user's location, it relies on DNS resolution and may be affected by the IP address cache of the user device. Stripe-free fully meets the requirements of "minimizing latency and not relying on IP address caching".

C.zh: 錯誤。CloudFront 主要用於內容傳遞網路 (CDN)，以優化靜態和動態內容的交付。雖然可以減少延遲，但不支援跨區域自動故障轉移，不符合問題的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. CloudFront is primarily used in Content Delivery Networks (CDNs) to optimize the delivery of static and dynamic content. Although it can reduce latency, it does not support automatic failover across regions and does not meet the requirements of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。應用負載平衡器主要用於單一區域內的流量分發。它不支援跨區域流量路由或自動故障轉移，因為這不符合問題要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Application Load Balancer is mainly used for traffic distribution within a single area. It does not support cross-region traffic routing or automatic failover, as this does not meet the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 AWS Global Accelerator 進行運作狀況檢查。
answer_text.en: A. Use AWS Global Accelerator with health checks.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (97%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Global Accelerator 是一項專為優化全球用戶流量而設計的服務。它透過對任何區域使用靜態 IP 位址來減少延遲，並支援跨區域的自動故障轉移。健康檢查功能可確保流量路由到健康的端點。這個選項完全滿足了問題的要求，包括高可用性、低延遲和自動故障轉移。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (97%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Global Accelerator is a service specifically designed to optimize global user traffic. It reduces latency by using static IP addresses for any region and supports automatic failover across regions. Health check functionality ensures traffic is routed to healthy endpoints. this option fully meet the requirements of the question, including high availability, low latency and automatic failover.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家天氣預報公司需要以亞毫秒延遲處理數百 GB 的資料。該公司的資料中心擁有高效能運算 (HPC) 環境，並希望擴展其預測能力。解決方案架構師必須確定一個高度可用的雲端儲存解決方案，可以處理大量的持續吞吐量。儲存在解決方案中的檔案應該可供數千個同時存取和處理整個資料集的運算實例存取。解決方案架構師應該怎麼做才能滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A weather forecasting company needs to process hundreds of gigabytes of data with sub-millisecond latency. The company has a high performance computing (HPC) environment in its data center and wants to expand its forecasting capabilities. A solutions architect must identify a highly available cloud storage solution that can handle large amounts of sustained throughput. Files that are stored in the solution should be accessible to thousands of compute instances that will simultaneously access and process the entire dataset. What should the solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 將 Amazon FSx 用於 Lustre 暫存檔案系統。
A.en: Use Amazon FSx for Lustre scratch file systems.

B.zh: 將 Amazon FSx 用於 Lustre 持久性檔案系統。
B.en: Use Amazon FSx for Lustre persistent file systems.

C.zh: 將 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 與突發吞吐量模式結合使用。
C.en: Use Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) with Bursting Throughput mode.

D.zh: 將 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 與預先設定吞吐量模式結合使用。
D.en: Use Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) with Provisioned Throughput mode.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon FSx for Lustre 暫存檔案系統是適合短期運算任務的暫存檔案系統。雖然它可以提供高吞吐量和低延遲，但它不適合需要持久儲存的場景，因為檔案系統刪除後資料會遺失。因此，這個選項不符合問題中「高可用性」和「持久性儲存」的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon FSx for Luster scratch file systems is a temporary file system suitable for short-term computing tasks. Although it can provide high throughput and low latency, it is not suitable for scenarios that require persistent storage because data will be lost after file system deletion. Therefore, this option does not meet the requirements of "high availability" and "persistent storage" in the question.

B.zh: 正確。Amazon FSx for Lustre 持久性檔案系統提供高效能存儲，支援 HPC 環境的高吞吐量和低延遲。支援持久化存儲，資料不會因為檔案系統的刪除而遺失，滿足了問題中「高可用」和「持久化儲存」的要求。另外，它可以支援多個計算實例同時存取和處理數據，非常適合問題中描述的場景。
B.en: Correct. Amazon FSx for Luster persistent file systems provides high-performance storage that supports high throughput and low latency for HPC environments. It supports persistent storage, and data will not be lost due to deletion of the file system, which meets the requirements of "high availability" and "persistent storage" in the question. In addition, it can support multiple computing instances to access and process data at the same time, which is very suitable for the scenario described in the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EFS 的突發吞吐量模式適用於不連續工作負載，吞吐量會根據檔案系統大小動態調整。雖然 EFS 提供了高可用性和持久性存儲，但其效能不如 FSx for Lustre，尤其是在需要大量資料和低延遲的 HPC 場景中。因此，這個選項不符合問題中「高效能運算」和「高吞吐量」的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon EFS's Bursting Throughput mode is suitable for discontinuous workloads, with throughput dynamically adjusting based on file system size. While EFS provides high availability and durable storage, its performance is not as good as FSx for Luster, especially in HPC scenarios where large amounts of data and low latency are required. Therefore, this option does not meet the requirements of "high performance computing" and "high throughput" in the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EFS 的預置吞吐量模式允許使用者手動設定吞吐量，但其效能仍不如 FSx for Lustre。雖然它提供了高可用性和持久存儲，但在 HPC 場景中，FSx for Lustre 更適合處理大規模資料和低延遲需求。因此，這個選項不符合問題中「高效能運算」和「高吞吐量」的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Amazon EFS's Provisioned Throughput mode allows users to manually set throughput, but still does not perform as well as FSx for Luster. Although it provides high availability and durable storage, in HPC scenarios, FSx for Luster is better suited to handle large-scale data and low latency needs. Therefore, this option does not meet the requirements of "high performance computing" and "high throughput" in the question.

answer_text.zh: B. 將 Amazon FSx 用於 Lustre 持久性檔案系統。
answer_text.en: B. Use Amazon FSx for Lustre persistent file systems.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon FSx for Lustre 持久性檔案系統提供高效能存儲，支援 HPC 環境的高吞吐量和低延遲。支援持久化存儲，資料不會因為檔案系統的刪除而遺失，滿足了問題中「高可用」和「持久化儲存」的要求。另外，它可以支援多個計算實例同時存取和處理數據，非常適合問題中描述的場景。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon FSx for Luster persistent file systems provides high-performance storage that supports high throughput and low latency for HPC environments. It supports persistent storage, and data will not be lost due to deletion of the file system, which meets the requirements of "high availability" and "persistent storage" in the question. In addition, it can support multiple computing instances to access and process data at the same time, which is very suitable for the scenario described in the question.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家電子商務公司在本地經營 PostgreSQL 資料庫。資料庫使用高 IOPS Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 區塊儲存來儲存資料。每日每秒峰值 I/O 交易不超過 15,000 IOPS。該公司希望將資料庫遷移到 Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL，並提供獨立於磁碟儲存容量的磁碟 IOPS 效能。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: An ecommerce company runs a PostgreSQL database on premises. The database stores data by using high IOPS Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) block storage. The daily peak I/O transactions per second do not exceed 15,000 IOPS. The company wants to migrate the database to Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL and provision disk IOPS performance independent of disk storage capacity. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 設定通用 SSD (gp2) EBS 磁碟區儲存類型並配置 15,000 IOPS。
A.en: Configure the General Purpose SSD (gp2) EBS volume storage type and provision 15,000 IOPS.

B.zh: 設定預先設定 IOPS SSD (io1) EBS 磁碟區儲存類型並預先設定 15,000 IOPS。
B.en: Configure the Provisioned IOPS SSD (io1) EBS volume storage type and provision 15,000 IOPS.

C.zh: 設定通用 SSD (gp3) EBS 磁碟區儲存類型並配置 15,000 IOPS。
C.en: Configure the General Purpose SSD (gp3) EBS volume storage type and provision 15,000 IOPS.

D.zh: 配置 EBS 磁卷類型以實現最大 IOPS。
D.en: Configure the EBS magnetic volume type to achieve maximum IOPS.

A.zh: 錯誤。gp2儲存類型的IOPS容量與儲存容量關聯，無法單獨配置IOPS。要達到15000 IOPS，必須配置非常大的儲存容量，這會增加成本。
A.en: Incorrect. The IOPS capacity of the gp2 storage type is associated with the storage capacity, and IOPS cannot be configured independently. To reach 15,000 IOPS, very large storage capacity must be configured, which will increase costs.

B.zh: 錯誤。但不是最優的：io1支援IOPS和儲存容量獨立配置，可以滿足15000 IOPS的需求。但io1成本較高，並不是性價比最高的方案。
B.en: Incorrect. But not optimal: io1 supports independent configuration of IOPS and storage capacity, which can meet the demand of 15,000 IOPS. But io1 has a higher cost and is not the most cost-effective solution.

C.zh: 正確。而最好的是：gp3支援獨立配置IOPS和儲存容量，可以滿足15000 IOPS的需求，而且成本比io1更低，是性價比最高的解決方案。
C.en: Correct. And the best: gp3 supports independent configuration of IOPS and storage capacity, can meet the demand of 15,000 IOPS, and has a lower cost than io1, making it the most cost-effective solution.

D.zh: 錯誤。EBS磁捲類型效能較低，無法滿足15000 IOPS的需求，而磁捲主要用於效能要求不高的場景。
D.en: Incorrect. The EBS magnetic volume type has low performance and cannot meet the demand of 15,000 IOPS, and the magnetic volume is mainly used in scenarios with low performance requirements.

answer_text.zh: C. 設定通用 SSD (gp3) EBS 磁碟區儲存類型並配置 15,000 IOPS。
answer_text.en: C. Configure the General Purpose SSD (gp3) EBS volume storage type and provision 15,000 IOPS.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：而最好的是：gp3支援獨立配置IOPS和儲存容量，可以滿足15000 IOPS的需求，而且成本比io1更低，是性價比最高的解決方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: And the best: gp3 supports independent configuration of IOPS and storage capacity, can meet the demand of 15,000 IOPS, and has a lower cost than io1, making it the most cost-effective solution.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望將其本地 Microsoft SQL Server Enterprise 版資料庫遷移到 AWS。該公司的線上應用程式使用資料庫來處理交易。數據分析團隊使用相同的生產資料庫來執行報告進行分析處理。該公司希望透過盡可能轉向託管服務來減少營運開銷。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to migrate its on-premises Microsoft SQL Server Enterprise edition database to AWS. The company's online application uses the database to process transactions. The data analysis team uses the same production database to run reports for analytical processing. The company wants to reduce operational overhead by moving to managed services wherever possible. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 移轉到 Amazon RDS for Microsoft SOL Server。使用唯讀副本進行報告
A.en: Migrate to Amazon RDS for Microsoft SOL Server. Use read replicas for reporting purposes

B.zh: 移轉到 Amazon EC2 上的 Microsoft SQL Server。使用 Always On 只讀副本進行報告
B.en: Migrate to Microsoft SQL Server on Amazon EC2. Use Always On read replicas for reporting purposes

C.zh: 移轉到 Amazon DynamoDB。使用 DynamoDB 按需副本進行報告
C.en: Migrate to Amazon DynamoDB. Use DynamoDB on-demand replicas for reporting purposes

D.zh: 移轉到 Amazon Aurora MySQL。使用 Aurora 只讀副本進行報告
D.en: Migrate to Amazon Aurora MySQL. Use Aurora read replicas for reporting purposes

A.zh: 正確。效能分析：Amazon RDS 是一項支援 Microsoft SQL Server 企業版的託管服務，可大幅降低營運開銷。只讀副本可用於分離事務處理和分析處理，以滿足報告需求。此選項滿足問題要求且操作開銷最低。
A.en: Correct. Performance analysis: Amazon RDS is a hosting service that supports Microsoft SQL Server Enterprise Edition, which can significantly reduce operational overhead. Read-only replicas can be used to separate transaction processing and analytical processing to meet reporting needs. This option meets the question requirements and has the lowest operational overhead.

B.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：在 Amazon EC2 上執行 SQL Server 需要自行管理作業、資料庫軟體和高可用性配置。雖然Always On只讀副本可以滿足報告需求，但操作開銷較高，不符合「減少操作開銷」的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Running SQL Server on Amazon EC2 requires self-management of operations, database software, and high-availability configuration. Although Always On read replicas can meet reporting requirements, the operation overhead is high and does not meet the requirement of "reducing operation overhead".

C.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：DynamoDB是非連接資料庫，不適合用於遷移相關的SQL Server資料庫。雖然DynamoDB支援按需副本，但無法滿足事務處理和分析處理的需求。
C.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: DynamoDB is a non-connected database and is not suitable for migrating related SQL Server databases. Although DynamoDB supports on-demand replicas, it cannot meet the needs of transaction processing and analytical processing.

D.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：Aurora MySQL 是一個獨立的資料庫，但它與 SQL Server 不相容。遷移到Aurora MySQL需要重構應用程式和資料庫架構，增加了操作複雜度。
D.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Aurora MySQL is a standalone database, but it is incompatible with SQL Server. Migrating to Aurora MySQL requires restructuring the application program and database architecture, which increases operational complexity.

answer_text.zh: A. 移轉到 Amazon RDS for Microsoft SOL Server。使用唯讀副本進行報告
answer_text.en: A. Migrate to Amazon RDS for Microsoft SOL Server. Use read replicas for reporting purposes

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：效能分析：Amazon RDS 是一項支援 Microsoft SQL Server 企業版的託管服務，可大幅降低營運開銷。只讀副本可用於分離事務處理和分析處理，以滿足報告需求。此選項滿足問題要求且操作開銷最低。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Performance analysis: Amazon RDS is a hosting service that supports Microsoft SQL Server Enterprise Edition, which can significantly reduce operational overhead. Read-only replicas can be used to separate transaction processing and analytical processing to meet reporting needs. This option meets the question requirements and has the lowest operational overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中儲存大量影像檔案。圖像需要在前 180 天內隨時可用。在接下來的 180 天內，這些圖像很少被訪問。 360 天后，圖像需要存檔，但必須根據請求立即可用。 5 年後，只有審核員才能存取影像。審核員必須能夠在 12 小時內檢索影像。在此過程中影像不會遺失。開發人員將在前 180 天使用 S3 標準儲存。開發者需要配置S3生命週期規則。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company stores a large volume of image files in an Amazon S3 bucket. The images need to be readily available for the first 180 days. The images are infrequently accessed for the next 180 days. After 360 days, the images need to be archived but must be available instantly upon request. After 5 years, only auditors can access the images. The auditors must be able to retrieve the images within 12 hours. The images cannot be lost during this process. A developer will use S3 Standard storage for the first 180 days. The developer needs to configure an S3 Lifecycle rule. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 180 天後將物件轉換為 S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA)。 360 天後 S3 Glacier 即時檢索，5 年後 S3 Glacier 深度存檔。
A.en: Transition the objects to S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA) after 180 days. S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval after 360 days, and S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 5 years.

B.zh: 180 天後將物件轉換為 S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA)。 360 天後 S3 Glacier 彈性檢索，5 年後 S3 Glacier 深度存檔。
B.en: Transition the objects to S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA) after 180 days. S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval after 360 days, and S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 5 years.

C.zh: 180 天後將物件轉換為 S3 標準-不頻繁存取 (S3 標準-IA)，360 天後將物件轉換為 S3 Glacier 即時檢索，5 年後將物件轉換為 S3 Glacier Deep Archive。
C.en: Transition the objects to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 180 days, S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval after 360 days, and S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 5 years.

D.zh: 180 天後將物件轉換為 S3 標準-不頻繁存取 (S3 標準-IA)，360 天後將物件轉換為 S3 Glacier 彈性檢索，5 年後將物件轉換為 S3 Glacier Deep Archive。
D.en: Transition the objects to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 180 days, S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval after 360 days, and S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 5 years.

A.zh: 錯誤。S3 One Zone-IA儲存類別不提供高可用性，因為資料僅儲存在一個可用區中，並且存在資料遺失的風險，不符合「不遺失資料」的問題要求。正確：S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval 和 S3 Glacier Deep Archive 的選擇符合題目要求，但先前的儲存類別選擇不合適。
A.en: Incorrect. The S3 One Zone-IA storage category does not provide high availability because the data is only stored in one availability zone, and there is a risk of data loss, which does not meet the question requirement of "no data loss". Correct: The selection of S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval and S3 Glacier Deep Archive meets the question requirements, but the previous storage category selection is inappropriate.

B.zh: 錯誤。同樣由S3 One Zone-IA引起的高可用問題不符合「無資料遺失」的問題要求。正確：S3 Glacier 彈性檢索和 S3 Glacier Deep Archive 的選擇符合題目要求，但先前的儲存類別選擇不合適。
B.en: Incorrect. The same high availability problem caused by S3 One Zone-IA does not meet the question requirement of "no data loss". Correct: The selection of S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval and S3 Glacier Deep Archive meets the question requirements, but the previous storage category selection is inappropriate.

C.zh: 正確。S3 Standard-IA提供高可用性和低成本存儲，適用於180天後存取不頻繁的場景。正確：S3 Glacier 即時檢索提供低延遲訪問，適合需要 360 天後立即訪問的場景。正確：S3 Glacier Deep Archive 提供最低成本的存儲，適合 5 年後僅審計使用。
C.en: Correct. S3 Standard-IA provides high availability and low-cost storage, and is suitable for scenarios where access is infrequent after 180 days. Correct: S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval provides low-latency access and is suitable for scenarios that require immediate access after 360 days. Correct: S3 Glacier Deep Archive provides the lowest cost storage and is suitable for audit-only use after 5 years.

D.zh: 錯誤。S3 Standard-IA提供高可用性和低成本存儲，適用於180天後存取頻率較低的場景。錯誤：S3 Glacier彈性檢索的訪問時間較長（分鐘到小時），不符合「必須立即存取」的問題要求。正確：S3 Glacier Deep Archive 提供最低成本的存儲，適合 5 年後僅審計使用。
D.en: Incorrect. S3 Standard-IA provides high availability and low-cost storage, and is suitable for scenarios where access is infrequent after 180 days. Error: The access time of S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval is long (ranging from minutes to hours), which does not meet the question requirement of "must be accessed immediately". Correct: S3 Glacier Deep Archive provides the lowest cost storage and is suitable for audit-only use after 5 years.

answer_text.zh: C. 180 天後將物件轉換為 S3 標準-不頻繁存取 (S3 標準-IA)，360 天後將物件轉換為 S3 Glacier 即時檢索，5 年後將物件轉換為 S3 Glacier Deep Archive。
answer_text.en: C. Transition the objects to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 180 days, S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval after 360 days, and S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 5 years.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (85%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：S3 Standard-IA提供高可用性和低成本存儲，適用於180天後存取不頻繁的場景。正確：S3 Glacier 即時檢索提供低延遲訪問，適合需要 360 天後立即訪問的場景。正確：S3 Glacier Deep Archive 提供最低成本的存儲，適合 5 年後僅審計使用。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (85%). Popular discussion and key point summary: S3 Standard-IA provides high availability and low-cost storage, and is suitable for scenarios where access is infrequent after 180 days. Correct: S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval provides low-latency access and is suitable for scenarios that require immediate access after 360 days. Correct: S3 Glacier Deep Archive provides the lowest cost storage and is suitable for audit-only use after 5 years.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 某公司有大量資料工作負載，每天運作 6 小時。流程運行時公司不會遺失任何資料。解決方案架構師正在設計 Amazon EMR 叢集配置來支援此關鍵資料工作負載。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has a large data workload that runs for 6 hours each day. The company cannot lose any data while the process is running. A solutions architect is designing an Amazon EMR cluster configuration to support this critical data workload. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 配置一個長期運行的集群，該集群在按需實例上運行主節點和核心節點，在競價型實例上運行任務節點。
A.en: Configure a long-running cluster that runs the primary node and core nodes on On-Demand Instances and the task nodes on Spot Instances.

B.zh: 配置一個臨時集群，該集群在按需實例上運行主節點和核心節點，在競價型實例上運行任務節點。
B.en: Configure a transient cluster that runs the primary node and core nodes on On-Demand Instances and the task nodes on Spot Instances.

C.zh: 配置一個臨時集群，該集群在按需實例上運行主節點，並在 Spot 實例上運行核心節點和任務節點。
C.en: Configure a transient cluster that runs the primary node on an On-Demand Instance and the core nodes and task nodes on Spot Instances.

D.zh: 配置一個長期運行的集群，該集群在按需實例上運行主節點、在競價型實例上運行核心節點以及在競價型實例上運行任務節點。
D.en: Configure a long-running cluster that runs the primary node on an On-Demand Instance, the core nodes on Spot Instances, and the task nodes on Spot Instances.

A.zh: 錯誤。長時間運行的叢集適合持久化任務，但成本較高，因為主節點和核心節點都使用按需實例。錯誤原因：雖然任務節點使用Spot執行個體降低了一些成本，但長期運行叢集會增加整體成本，並不是最具成本效益的解決方案。
A.en: Incorrect. Long-running clusters are suitable for persistent tasks, but the cost is higher because both the master node and the core node use On-Demand Instances. Reason for the error: Although using Spot Instances for task nodes reduces some costs, long-term running clusters will increase the overall cost and are not the most cost-effective solution.

B.zh: 正確。臨時叢集適合短期任務（例如每天運行6小時）。主節點和核心節點採用隨選實例，確保資料可靠性；任務節點採用競價型實例，降低成本。此配置滿足資料可靠性要求，並透過使用 Spot 實例優化成本，使其成為最具成本效益的解決方案。
B.en: Correct. Temporary clusters are suitable for short-term tasks (such as running 6 hours a day). On-Demand Instances are used on the main node and core nodes to ensure data reliability, and Spot Instances are used on task nodes to reduce costs. This configuration meets the data reliability requirements and optimizes costs through the use of Spot Instances, making it the most cost-effective solution.

C.zh: 錯誤。臨時叢集適合短期任務，主節點採用按需實例來確保可靠性。錯誤原因：在核心節點使用Spot實例可能會導致資料遺失，因為Spot實例可能會中斷，不符合「資料不能遺失」的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Temporary clusters are suitable for short-term tasks, and the master node uses On-Demand Instance to ensure reliability. Reason for the error: The use of Spot Instances on the core node may result in data loss, because Spot Instances may be interrupted, which does not meet the requirements of the question "no data can be lost".

D.zh: 錯誤。長時間運行的叢集適合連續任務，主節點採用按需實例來確保可靠性。錯誤原因：在核心節點使用Spot實例可能會導致資料遺失，不符合「資料不能遺失」的問題要求。此外，長期運作的叢集成本更高，並不是最具成本效益的解決方案。
D.en: Incorrect. Long-running clusters are suitable for continuous tasks, and the master node uses On-Demand Instance to ensure reliability. Reason for the error: Using Spot Instances on the core node may cause data loss, which does not meet the question requirement of "no data can be lost". Additionally, long-term running clusters are more expensive and are not the most cost-effective solution.

answer_text.zh: B. 配置一個臨時集群，該集群在按需實例上運行主節點和核心節點，在競價型實例上運行任務節點。
answer_text.en: B. Configure a transient cluster that runs the primary node and core nodes on On-Demand Instances and the task nodes on Spot Instances.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：臨時叢集適合短期任務（例如每天運行6小時）。主節點和核心節點採用隨選實例，確保資料可靠性；任務節點採用競價型實例，降低成本。此配置滿足資料可靠性要求，並透過使用 Spot 實例優化成本，使其成為最具成本效益的解決方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Temporary clusters are suitable for short-term tasks (such as running 6 hours a day). On-Demand Instances are used on the main node and core nodes to ensure data reliability, and Spot Instances are used on task nodes to reduce costs. This configuration meets the data reliability requirements and optimizes costs through the use of Spot Instances, making it the most cost-effective solution.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司維護一個將使用者對應到成本中心的 Amazon RDS 資料庫。該公司在 AWS Organizations 的一個組織中擁有帳戶。該公司需要一種解決方案來標記在組織中的特定 AWS 帳戶中建立的所有資源。解決方案必須使用建立該資源的使用者的成本中心 ID 來標記每個資源。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company maintains an Amazon RDS database that maps users to cost centers. The company has accounts in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company needs a solution that will tag all resources that are created in a specific AWS account in the organization. The solution must tag each resource with the cost center ID of the user who created the resource. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 將特定 AWS 帳戶從管理帳戶移至組織中的新組織單位 (OU)。建立服務控制策略 (SCP)，要求所有現有資源在建立資源之前具有正確的成本中心標籤。將 SCP 應用到新 OU。
A.en: Move the specific AWS account to a new organizational unit (OU) in Organizations from the management account. Create a service control policy (SCP) that requires all existing resources to have the correct cost center tag before the resources are created. Apply the SCP to the new OU.

B.zh: 建立 AWS Lambda 函數，以在 Lambda 函數從 RDS 資料庫尋找適當的成本中心後標記資源。配置回應 AWS CloudTrail 事件的 Amazon EventBridge 規則以呼叫 Lambda 函數。
B.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to tag the resources after the Lambda function looks up the appropriate cost center from the RDS database. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to AWS CloudTrail events to invoke the Lambda function.

C.zh: 建立 AWS CloudFormation 堆疊以部署 AWS Lambda 函數。配置 Lambda 函數以從 RDS 資料庫中尋找適當的成本中心並標記資源。建立 Amazon EventBridge 計劃規則以呼叫 CloudFormation 堆疊。
C.en: Create an AWS CloudFormation stack to deploy an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to look up the appropriate cost center from the RDS database and to tag resources. Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to invoke the CloudFormation stack.

D.zh: 建立 AWS Lambda 函數以使用預設值標記資源。配置 Amazon EventBridge 規則，該規則會回應 AWS CloudTrail 事件，以便在資源缺少成本中心標籤時呼叫 Lambda 函數。
D.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to tag the resources with a default value. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to AWS CloudTrail events to invoke the Lambda function when a resource is missing the cost center tag.

A.zh: 錯誤。SCP 可以要求呼叫者提供特定的標籤金鑰，但它無法查詢每個建立者成本中心的 RDS 並在資源建立後動態套用對應的標籤。
A.en: Incorrect. An SCP can require that callers supply particular tag keys, but it cannot query RDS for each creator’s cost center and dynamically apply the corresponding tag after resource creation.

B.zh: 正確。分析：此選項透過EventBridge規則監聽CloudTrail事件並觸發Lambda函數。 Lambda函數可以查詢RDS資料庫取得使用者的成本中心ID並對資源進行標記。標籤選項完全滿足問題要求，可以動態為資源添加準確的標籤。使用EventBridge和Lambda實現自動標記功能。
B.en: Correct. Analysis: this option listens to CloudTrail events through EventBridge rules and triggers the Lambda function. The Lambda function can query the RDS database to obtain the user's cost center ID and tag the resource. The label option fully meets the question requirements and can dynamically add accurate labels to resources. Use EventBridge and Lambda to implement automated tagging functionality.

C.zh: 錯誤。分析：此選項使用CloudFormation部署Lambda函數，但定期觸發EventBridge規則，而不是監聽CloudTrail事件。定期觸發不受監管的即時回應資源建立事件不符合問題的要求。錯誤原因：計時規則不規範，需設定動態標籤。
C.en: Incorrect. Analysis: this option uses CloudFormation to deploy the Lambda function, but the EventBridge rule is triggered regularly instead of listening to CloudTrail events. Triggering an unregulated real-time response resource creation event regularly does not meet the requirements of the question. Reason for the error: The timing rule is unregulated and the dynamic label needs to be set.

D.zh: 錯誤。分析：此選項為資源新增預設值標籤，而不是根據使用者的成本中心ID動態新增標籤。此問題需要根據使用者的成本中心ID動態標記，但其他選項不符合要求。錯誤原因：動態標籤沒有具體要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Analysis: this option adds a default value label to the resource instead of dynamically adding a label based on the user's cost center ID. The question needs to be dynamically tagged based on the user's cost center ID, but the other options do not meet the requirements. Reason for the error: There are no specific requirements for dynamic tags.

answer_text.zh: B. 建立 AWS Lambda 函數，以在 Lambda 函數從 RDS 資料庫尋找適當的成本中心後標記資源。配置回應 AWS CloudTrail 事件的 Amazon EventBridge 規則以呼叫 Lambda 函數。
answer_text.en: B. Create an AWS Lambda function to tag the resources after the Lambda function looks up the appropriate cost center from the RDS database. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to AWS CloudTrail events to invoke the Lambda function.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (64%)； A (36%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：此選項透過EventBridge規則監聽CloudTrail事件並觸發Lambda函數。 Lambda函數可以查詢RDS資料庫取得使用者的成本中心ID並對資源進行標記。標籤選項完全滿足問題要求，可以動態為資源添加準確的標籤。使用EventBridge和Lambda實現自動標記功能。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (64%); A (36%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: this option listens to CloudTrail events through EventBridge rules and triggers the Lambda function. The Lambda function can query the RDS database to obtain the user's cost center ID and tag the resource. The label option fully meets the question requirements and can dynamically add accurate labels to resources. Use EventBridge and Lambda to implement automated tagging functionality.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司最近將其 Web 應用程式遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體執行多個進程來託管應用程式。這些進程包含一個提供靜態內容的 Apache Web 伺服器。 Apache Web 伺服器向使用本機 Redis 伺服器進行使用者會話的 PHP 應用程式發出請求。該公司希望重新設計架構，使其具有高可用性並使用 AWS 託管解決方案。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company recently migrated its web application to the AWS Cloud. The company uses an Amazon EC2 instance to run multiple processes to host the application. The processes include an Apache web server that serves static content. The Apache web server makes requests to a PHP application that uses a local Redis server for user sessions. The company wants to redesign the architecture to be highly available and to use AWS managed solutions. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 託管靜態內容和 PHP 應用程式。配置 Elastic Beanstalk 以將其 EC2 執行個體部署到公有子網路中。分配公共 IP 位址。
A.en: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk to host the static content and the PHP application. Configure Elastic Beanstalk to deploy its EC2 instance into a public subnet. Assign a public IP address.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 託管靜態內容和 PHP 應用程式。使用 Amazon API Gateway REST API 將請求代理程式到 Lambda 函數。設定API網關CORS配置響應域名。配置 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 以處理會話資訊。
B.en: Use AWS Lambda to host the static content and the PHP application. Use an Amazon API Gateway REST API to proxy requests to the Lambda function. Set the API Gateway CORS configuration to respond to the domain name. Configure Amazon ElastiCache for Redis to handle session information.

C.zh: 將後端程式碼保留在 EC2 執行個體上。建立啟用了多可用區的 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 叢集。在叢集模式下設定 ElastiCache for Redis 叢集。將前端資源複製到 Amazon S3。配置後端程式碼以引用 EC2 執行個體。
C.en: Keep the backend code on the EC2 instance. Create an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster that has Multi-AZ enabled. Configure the ElastiCache for Redis cluster in cluster mode. Copy the frontend resources to Amazon S3. Configure the backend code to reference the EC2 instance.

D.zh: 將具有 Amazon S3 終端節點的 Amazon CloudFront 指派配置為配置為託管靜態內容的 S3 儲存桶。配置面向 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 服務的 Application Load Balancer，該服務為 PHP 應用程式執行 AWS Fargate 任務。配置 PHP 應用程式以使用在多個可用區中執行的 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 叢集。
D.en: Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution with an Amazon S3 endpoint to an S3 bucket that is configured to host the static content. Configure an Application Load Balancer that targets an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service that runs AWS Fargate tasks for the PHP application. Configure the PHP application to use an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster that runs in multiple Availability Zones.

A.zh: 錯誤。使用 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 託管靜態內容和 PHP 應用程式。 Elastic Beanstalk 適合管理動態應用程序，但不適合管理靜態內容（例如 HTML、CSS 等）。伺服器通常託管在 Amazon S3 中，以實現高可用性和低成本。將 Elastic Beanstalk 部署到公有子網路並指派公有 IP 位址不是最佳實踐，並且與高可用性架構完全不一致。此選項沒有提及如何處理 Redis 會話信任，也沒有提及跨可用區的高可用性。錯誤原因：不符合高可用性準則和最佳實務。
A.en: Incorrect. Host static content and PHP applications using AWS Elastic Beanstalk. Elastic Beanstalk is suitable for managing dynamic applications, but it is not suitable for managing static content (such as HTML, CSS, etc.). Servers are typically hosted in Amazon S3 to achieve high availability and low cost. Deploying Elastic Beanstalk to a public subnet and assigning a public IP address is not a best practice and is completely inconsistent with a high-availability architecture. This option does not mention how to handle Redis session trust, nor does it mention high availability across Availability Zones. Reason for the error: It does not comply with high availability guidelines and best practices.

B.zh: 錯誤。使用 AWS Lambda 託管靜態內容和 PHP 應用程式。 Lambda 適合執行無伺服器動態程式碼，但不適合管理靜態內部。伺服器內部通常託管在 Amazon S3 中。 API Gateway可以將請求代理程式到Lambda，但這個選項沒有提到如何實現高可用性，也沒有提到跨可用區的Redis叢集。錯誤原因：Lambda不適合管理靜態內部，也沒有提到高可用設計。
B.en: Incorrect. Host static content and PHP applications using AWS Lambda. Lambda is suitable for running serverless dynamic code, but it is not suitable for managing static internals. Server internals are usually hosted in Amazon S3. API Gateway can proxy requests to Lambda, but this option does not mention how to achieve high availability, nor does it mention Redis clusters across availability zones. Reason for the error: Lambda is not suitable for managing static internals, and high availability design is not mentioned.

C.zh: 錯誤。將後端程式碼保留在 EC2 執行個體上。此選項保留EC2執行個體作為後端程式碼的運作環境，但EC2執行個體本身不是託管服務，無法自動實現高可用性。雖然Amazon S3管理伺服器內部和ElastiCache用於處理Redis會話信任，但EC2實例的單點故障問題仍然存在。錯誤原因：EC2執行個體無法自動實現高可用，且沒有提及如何處理執行個體的伺服器化和負載平衡。
C.en: Incorrect. Keep backend code on EC2 instances. This option retains the EC2 instance as the running environment for the back-end code, but the EC2 instance itself is not a managed service and cannot automatically achieve high availability. Although Amazon S3 management server internals and ElastiCache are used to handle the Redis session trust, the single point of failure problem of the EC2 instance still exists. Reason for the error: EC2 instances cannot automatically achieve high availability, and there is no mention of how to handle serverization and load balancing of instances.

D.zh: 正確。設定 Amazon CloudFront 指派以將 Amazon S3 終端節點指向配置為託管靜態內容的 S3 儲存桶。使用Amazon S3來管理內部資料是最佳實踐，並與CloudFront結合以實現全球內部分佈和低延遲。使用應用程式負載平衡器和 Amazon ECS（在 Fargate 上運行）管理 PHP 應用程式是一種高度可用的管理解決方案。配置 ElastiCache for Redis 叢集在多個可用區中運行，以確保會話伺服器的高可用性。正確原因：此選項完全實現了高可用性託管和託管服務的最佳實踐。
D.en: Correct. Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution to point the Amazon S3 endpoint to an S3 bucket configured to host static content. It is the best practice to use Amazon S3 to manage internal data, and combine it with CloudFront to achieve global internal distribution and low latency. Managing PHP applications using Application Load Balancer and Amazon ECS (running on Fargate) is a highly available management solution. Configure the ElastiCache for Redis cluster to run in multiple availability zones to ensure high availability of the session server. Reason for Correct: This option fully implements best practices for highly available hosting and managed services.

answer_text.zh: D. 將具有 Amazon S3 終端節點的 Amazon CloudFront 指派配置為配置為託管靜態內容的 S3 儲存桶。配置面向 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 服務的 Application Load Balancer，該服務為 PHP 應用程式執行 AWS Fargate 任務。配置 PHP 應用程式以使用在多個可用區中執行的 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 叢集。
answer_text.en: D. Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution with an Amazon S3 endpoint to an S3 bucket that is configured to host the static content. Configure an Application Load Balancer that targets an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service that runs AWS Fargate tasks for the PHP application. Configure the PHP application to use an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster that runs in multiple Availability Zones.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：設定 Amazon CloudFront 指派以將 Amazon S3 終端節點指向配置為託管靜態內容的 S3 儲存桶。使用Amazon S3來管理內部資料是最佳實踐，並與CloudFront結合以實現全球內部分佈和低延遲。使用應用程式負載平衡器和 Amazon ECS（在 Fargate 上運行）管理 PHP 應用程式是一種高度可用的管理解決方案。配置 ElastiCache for Redis 叢集在多個可用區中運行，以確保會話伺服器的高可用性。正確原因：此選項完全實現了高可用性託管和託管服務的最佳實踐。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution to point the Amazon S3 endpoint to an S3 bucket configured to host static content. It is the best practice to use Amazon S3 to manage internal data, and combine it with CloudFront to achieve global internal distribution and low latency. Managing PHP applications using Application Load Balancer and Amazon ECS (running on Fargate) is a highly available management solution. Configure the ElastiCache for Redis cluster to run in multiple availability zones to ensure high availability of the session server. Reason for Correct: This option fully implements best practices for highly available hosting and managed services.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在具有目標群組的 Auto Scaling 群組中的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行 Web 應用程式。該公司將該應用程式設計為與會話親和性（粘性會話）配合使用，以獲得更好的用戶體驗。該應用程式必須作為端點透過網路公開可用。必須將 WAF 應用於端點以提高安全性。必須在端點上配置會話親和性（黏性會話）。哪一種步驟組合可以滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company runs a web application on Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group that has a target group. The company designed the application to work with session affinity (sticky sessions) for a better user experience. The application must be available publicly over the internet as an endpoint. A WAF must be applied to the endpoint for additional security. Session affinity (sticky sessions) must be configured on the endpoint. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 建立公用網路負載平衡器。指定應用程式目標群組。
A.en: Create a public Network Load Balancer. Specify the application target group.

B.zh: 建立網關負載平衡器。指定應用程式目標群組。
B.en: Create a Gateway Load Balancer. Specify the application target group.

C.zh: 建立公用應用程式負載平衡器。指定應用程式目標群組。
C.en: Create a public Application Load Balancer. Specify the application target group.

D.zh: 建立第二個目標組。將彈性 IP 位址新增至 EC2 執行個體。
D.en: Create a second target group. Add Elastic IP addresses to the EC2 instances.

E.zh: 在 AWS WAF 中建立 Web ACL。將 Web ACL 與端點關聯
E.en: Create a web ACL in AWS WAF. Associate the web ACL with the endpoint

A.zh: 錯誤。網路負載平衡器不支援會話黏著度（黏性會話）。會話黏性是應用程式負載平衡器的功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Network Load Balancer does not support session stickiness (Sticky Sessions). Session stickiness is a feature of the Application Load Balancer.

B.zh: 錯誤。閘道負載平衡器主要用於流量轉送和網路安全設備整合。不適合Web應用的負載平衡，也不支援會話黏性。
B.en: Incorrect. Gateway Load Balancer is mainly used for traffic forwarding and integration of network security devices. It is not suitable for load balancing of web applications and does not support session stickiness.

C.zh: 正確。應用負載平衡器支援會話黏性（Sticky Sessions）並且可公開訪問，適合Web應用程式的負載平衡。
C.en: Correct. Application Load Balancer supports session stickiness (Sticky Sessions) and is publicly accessible, suitable for load balancing of web applications.

D.zh: 錯誤。建立第二個目標群組並新增彈性 IP 位址與問題要求無關。彈性 IP 位址通常用於靜態 IP 分配，而不是實現會話黏性或 WAF。
D.en: Incorrect. Creating a second target group and adding Elastic IP addresses are not relevant to the question requirements. Elastic IP addresses are typically used for static IP assignments rather than implementing session stickiness or WAF.

E.zh: 正確。AWS WAF 可以透過 Web ACL 提供額外的安全性，並且可以與 Application Load Balancer 關聯以保護公開的 Web 應用程式。
E.en: Correct. AWS WAF can provide additional security through web ACLs and can be associated with an Application Load Balancer to protect exposed web applications.

answer_text.zh: C. 建立公用應用程式負載平衡器。指定應用程式目標群組。；E. 在 AWS WAF 中建立 Web ACL。將 Web ACL 與端點關聯
answer_text.en: C. Create a public Application Load Balancer. Specify the application target group.; E. Create a web ACL in AWS WAF. Associate the web ACL with the endpoint

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：CE (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：應用負載平衡器支援會話黏性（Sticky Sessions）並且可公開訪問，適合Web應用程式的負載平衡。；AWS WAF 可以透過 Web ACL 提供額外的安全性，並且可以與 Application Load Balancer 關聯以保護公開的 Web 應用程式。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: CE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Application Load Balancer supports session stickiness (Sticky Sessions) and is publicly accessible, suitable for load balancing of web applications.; AWS WAF can provide additional security through web ACLs and can be associated with an Application Load Balancer to protect exposed web applications.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司經營一個儲存歷史事件圖像的網站。網站使用者需要能夠根據圖像中事件發生的年份搜尋和查看圖像。平均而言，用戶每年僅請求每張圖像一到兩次。該公司希望有一個高度可用的解決方案來儲存圖像並將其傳遞給用戶。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs a website that stores images of historical events. Website users need the ability to search and view images based on the year that the event in the image occurred. On average, users request each image only once or twice a year. The company wants a highly available solution to store and deliver the images to users. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 將影像儲存在 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 中。使用在 Amazon EC2 上執行的 Web 伺服器。
A.en: Store images in Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS). Use a web server that runs on Amazon EC2.

B.zh: 將影像儲存在 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 中。使用在 Amazon EC2 上執行的 Web 伺服器。
B.en: Store images in Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS). Use a web server that runs on Amazon EC2.

C.zh: 將影像儲存在 Amazon S3 Standard 中。使用S3標準，透過靜態網站直接投遞圖片。
C.en: Store images in Amazon S3 Standard. Use S3 Standard to directly deliver images by using a static website.

D.zh: 將影像儲存在 Amazon S3 標準-不頻繁存取 (S3 標準-IA) 中。使用S3 Standard-IA，透過靜態網站直接投遞圖片。
D.en: Store images in Amazon S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA). Use S3 Standard-IA to directly deliver images by using a static website.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EBS 是區塊存儲，通常用於 EC2 執行個體的持久性儲存。它不適合儲存和直接傳遞靜態內容（例如圖像），並且需要運行EC2實例，成本昂貴。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon EBS is block storage, commonly used for persistent storage of EC2 instances. It is not suitable for storing and directly delivering static content (such as images), and it requires running EC2 instances, which is expensive.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EFS 是一種文件存儲，適用於共用檔案不可用的場景。雖然可以儲存映像，但它需要運行 EC2 執行個體來託管 Web 伺服器，成本高且複雜。
B.en: Incorrect. Amazon EFS is a file storage, suitable for scenarios where shared files are not available. Although images can be stored, it requires running an EC2 instance to host the web server, which is costly and complex.

C.zh: 錯誤。部分正確：Amazon S3 Standard 適用於高頻存取物件存儲，支援靜態託管和內容直接交付。然而，問題提到，一般用戶每年只會訪問一到兩個文件。 S3標準的成本較高，不是最佳選擇。
C.en: Incorrect. Partially correct: Amazon S3 Standard is suitable for high-frequency access object storage, supporting static hosting and direct delivery of content. However, the question mentioned that the average user only accesses one or two files per year. The cost of S3 Standard is relatively high and is not the optimal choice.

D.zh: 正確。Amazon S3 Standard-IA 專為不經常存取的物件而設計，可提供較低的儲存成本，同時仍提供高可用性和低延遲。支援靜態託管和內容交付，是最能滿足問題要求的解決方案。
D.en: Correct. Amazon S3 Standard-IA is designed for infrequently accessed objects, providing low storage costs while still providing high availability and low latency. Supporting static hosting and delivery of content, it is the solution that best meets the requirements of the problem.

answer_text.zh: D. 將影像儲存在 Amazon S3 標準-不頻繁存取 (S3 標準-IA) 中。使用S3 Standard-IA，透過靜態網站直接投遞圖片。
answer_text.en: D. Store images in Amazon S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA). Use S3 Standard-IA to directly deliver images by using a static website.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (93%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon S3 Standard-IA 專為不經常存取的物件而設計，可提供較低的儲存成本，同時仍提供高可用性和低延遲。支援靜態託管和內容交付，是最能滿足問題要求的解決方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (93%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon S3 Standard-IA is designed for infrequently accessed objects, providing low storage costs while still providing high availability and low latency. Supporting static hosting and delivery of content, it is the solution that best meets the requirements of the problem.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在不同業務部門使用的 AWS Organizations 中的一個組織中擁有多個 AWS 帳戶。該公司在全球設有多個辦事處。本公司需要更新安全群組規則以允許新的辦公室 CIDR 範圍或刪除整個組織中的舊 CIDR 範圍。該公司希望集中管理安全群組規則，以最大限度地減少更新 CIDR 範圍所需的管理開銷。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has multiple AWS accounts in an organization in AWS Organizations that different business units use. The company has multiple offices around the world. The company needs to update security group rules to allow new office CIDR ranges or to remove old CIDR ranges across the organization. The company wants to centralize the management of security group rules to minimize the administrative overhead that updating CIDR ranges requires. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 在組織的管理帳戶中建立 VPC 安全性群組。當需要更新 CIDR 範圍時更新安全性群組。
A.en: Create VPC security groups in the organization's management account. Update the security groups when a CIDR range update is necessary.

B.zh: 建立包含 CIDR 清單的 VPC 客戶管理前綴清單。使用 AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) 在整個組織內共用前綴清單。使用整個組織的安全性群組中的前綴清單。
B.en: Create a VPC customer managed prefix list that contains the list of CIDRs. Use AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) to share the prefix list across the organization. Use the prefix list in the security groups across the organization.

C.zh: 建立 AWS 託管前綴清單。使用 AWS Security Hub 策略在整個組織內強制執行安全性群組更新。當 CIDR 範圍變更時，使用 AWS Lambda 函數自動更新前綴清單。
C.en: Create an AWS managed prefix list. Use an AWS Security Hub policy to enforce the security group update across the organization. Use an AWS Lambda function to update the prefix list automatically when the CIDR ranges change.

D.zh: 在中央管理 AWS 帳戶中建立安全性群組。為整個組織建立 AWS Firewall Manager 通用安全性群組原則。選擇先前建立的安全性群組作為政策中的主要群組。
D.en: Create security groups in a central administrative AWS account. Create an AWS Firewall Manager common security group policy for the whole organization. Select the previously created security groups as primary groups in the policy.

A.zh: 錯誤。建立 VPC 安全性群組並在管理帳戶中更新： 錯誤：雖然可以在管理帳戶中集中管理安全性群組，但這些安全性群組規則無法自動跨帳戶共享，並且管理多個帳戶的安全性群組規則會增加複雜性。 「跨群體痣管理」和「最具成本效益的類固醇」均不符合問題的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Create a VPC security group and update it in the management account: Error: Although security groups can be managed centrally in the management account, these security group rules cannot be automatically shared across accounts, and managing security group rules for multiple accounts adds complexity. "Cross-group nevus management" and "most cost-effective steroid" did not meet the requirements of the question.

B.zh: 正確。建立 VPC 客戶管理的前綴清單並使用 AWS RAM 共用它：正確：使用客戶管理的前綴清單可讓您集中管理 CIDR 範圍並使用 AWS RAM 在整個叢集中共用它們。前端清單可以直接應用於安全群組，降低管理複雜度和成本。符合題目要求的「跨群體痣管理」和「最具性價比的類固醇」。
B.en: Correct. Create a VPC customer-managed prefix list and share it using AWS RAM: Correct: Using a customer-managed prefix list allows you to centrally manage CIDR ranges and share them across your entire cluster using AWS RAM. Front-end lists can be directly applied to security groups, reducing management complexity and cost. "Cross-group nevus management" and "the most cost-effective steroid" that meet the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。建立 AWS 託管前綴列表並使用 AWS Security Hub 和 Lambda 更新：錯誤：AWS 託管前綴列表是 AWS 提供的預定義列表，無法滿足自訂 CIDR 範圍的需求。使用 AWS Security Hub 和 Lambda 會增加額外的複雜性和成本，並且不是最具成本效益的解決方案。
C.en: Incorrect. Creating an AWS managed prefix list and using AWS Security Hub and Lambda Update: Error: The AWS managed prefix list is a predefined list provided by AWS and cannot meet the needs of custom CIDR ranges. Using AWS Security Hub and Lambda adds additional complexity and cost and is not the most cost-effective solution.

D.zh: 錯誤。使用 AWS Firewall Manager 建立通用安全群組原則：錯誤：雖然 AWS Firewall Manager 可以集中管理安全性群組，但需要額外的配置和成本。為了安全的群組操作和效率，最好使用 AWS RAM 共享前端清單介面。
D.en: Incorrect. Using AWS Firewall Manager to create a universal security group policy: Error: Although AWS Firewall Manager can centrally manage security groups, it requires additional configuration and cost. It is better to use the AWS RAM shared front list interface for secure group operations and efficiency.

answer_text.zh: B. 建立包含 CIDR 清單的 VPC 客戶管理前綴清單。使用 AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) 在整個組織內共用前綴清單。使用整個組織的安全性群組中的前綴清單。
answer_text.en: B. Create a VPC customer managed prefix list that contains the list of CIDRs. Use AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) to share the prefix list across the organization. Use the prefix list in the security groups across the organization.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：建立 VPC 客戶管理的前綴清單並使用 AWS RAM 共用它：正確：使用客戶管理的前綴清單可讓您集中管理 CIDR 範圍並使用 AWS RAM 在整個叢集中共用它們。前端清單可以直接應用於安全群組，降低管理複雜度和成本。符合題目要求的「跨群體痣管理」和「最具性價比的類固醇」。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Create a VPC customer-managed prefix list and share it using AWS RAM: Correct: Using a customer-managed prefix list allows you to centrally manage CIDR ranges and share them across your entire cluster using AWS RAM. Front-end lists can be directly applied to security groups, reducing management complexity and cost. "Cross-group nevus management" and "the most cost-effective steroid" that meet the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用本地網路附加儲存 (NAS) 系統為其高效能運算 (HPC) 工作負載提供檔案共用。該公司希望將其對延遲敏感的 HPC 工作負載及其儲存空間遷移到 AWS 雲端。公司必須能夠從檔案系統提供 NFS 和 SMB 多協定存取。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的延遲滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company uses an on-premises network-attached storage (NAS) system to provide file shares to its high performance computing (HPC) workloads. The company wants to migrate its latency-sensitive HPC workloads and its storage to the AWS Cloud. The company must be able to provide NFS and SMB multi-protocol access from the file system. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST latency? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 將計算最佳化的 EC2 執行個體部署到叢集置放群組。
A.en: Deploy compute optimized EC2 instances into a cluster placement group.

B.zh: 將計算最佳化的 EC2 執行個體部署到分區置放群組。
B.en: Deploy compute optimized EC2 instances into a partition placement group.

C.zh: 將 EC2 執行個體附加到 Amazon FSx for Lustre 檔案系統。
C.en: Attach the EC2 instances to an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system.

D.zh: 將 EC2 執行個體附加到 Amazon FSx for OpenZFS 檔案系統。
D.en: Attach the EC2 instances to an Amazon FSx for OpenZFS file system.

E.zh: 將 EC2 執行個體附加到 Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 檔案系統。
E.en: Attach the EC2 instances to an Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP file system.

A.zh: 正確。分析：叢集置放群組提供低延遲、高吞吐量的網路連接，非常適合高效能運算 (HPC) 工作負載。這個選項是正確的。
A.en: Correct. Analysis: Cluster placement groups provide low-latency, high-throughput network connectivity and are ideal for high-performance computing (HPC) workloads. This option is correct.

B.zh: 錯誤。分析：分區放置群組主要用於分散式應用程式的容錯，而不是優化低延遲網路連線。因此，該選項不適合解決錯誤問題。
B.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Partition placement groups are primarily used for fault tolerance of distributed applications rather than optimizing low-latency network connections. Therefore, this option is not suitable for solving the problem,error.

C.zh: 錯誤。分析：Amazon FSx for Lustre 是專為高效能運算設計的檔案系統，但不支援 NFS 和 SMB 多協定存取。所以。
C.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Amazon FSx for Luster is a file system designed for high-performance computing, but it does not support NFS and SMB multi-protocol access. Therefore.

D.zh: 錯誤。分析：Amazon FSx for OpenZFS 支援 NFS 協議，但不支援 SMB 協議，因此無法滿足問題要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Amazon FSx for OpenZFS supports the NFS protocol, but does not support the SMB protocol, so it cannot meet the question requirements.

E.zh: 正確。分析：Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 支援 NFS 和 SMB 多協定訪問，並提供低延遲儲存解決方案，非常適合問題需求。這個選項是正確的。
E.en: Correct. Analysis: Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP supports NFS and SMB multi-protocol access, and provides low-latency storage solutions, which is very suitable for the question requirements. This option is correct.

answer_text.zh: A. 將計算最佳化的 EC2 執行個體部署到叢集置放群組。；E. 將 EC2 執行個體附加到 Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 檔案系統。
answer_text.en: A. Deploy compute optimized EC2 instances into a cluster placement group.; E. Attach the EC2 instances to an Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP file system.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AE (88%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：叢集置放群組提供低延遲、高吞吐量的網路連接，非常適合高效能運算 (HPC) 工作負載。這個選項是正確的。；分析：Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 支援 NFS 和 SMB 多協定訪問，並提供低延遲儲存解決方案，非常適合問題需求。這個選項是正確的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AE (88%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Cluster placement groups provide low-latency, high-throughput network connectivity and are ideal for high-performance computing (HPC) workloads. This option is correct.; Analysis: Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP supports NFS and SMB multi-protocol access, and provides low-latency storage solutions, which is very suitable for the question requirements. This option is correct.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在搬遷其資料中心，並希望在 2 週內將 50 TB 資料安全傳輸到 AWS。現有資料中心具有與 AWS 的站點到站點 VPN 連接，利用率為 90%。解決方案架構師應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is relocating its data center and wants to securely transfer 50 TB of data to AWS within 2 weeks. The existing data center has a Site-to-Site VPN connection to AWS that is 90% utilized. Which AWS service should a solutions architect use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 具有 VPC 終端節點的 AWS DataSync
A.en: AWS DataSync with a VPC endpoint

B.zh: AWS Direct Connect
B.en: AWS Direct Connect

C.zh: AWS Snowball 邊緣儲存最佳化
C.en: AWS Snowball Edge Storage Optimized

D.zh: AWS 儲存網關
D.en: AWS Storage Gateway

A.zh: 錯誤。DataSync 是一項用於將資料從本地自動遷移到 AWS 的服務。然而，DataSync 依賴現有網路連線（例如 VPN 或 Direct Connect），問題提到現有 VPN 連線已被佔用 90%，無法滿足 2 週內遷移 50 TB 資料的需求。所以。
A.en: Incorrect. DataSync is a service for automated data migration from on-premises to AWS. However, DataSync relies on existing network connections (such as VPN or Direct Connect), and the question mentions that the existing VPN connections are 90% occupied and cannot meet the demand for migrating 50 TB of data within 2 weeks. Therefore.

B.zh: 錯誤。Direct Connect 提供專用網路連接，可提高資料傳輸速度和穩定性。但是，設定 Direct Connect 需要時間（通常為數週至數月），無法滿足問題中 2 週的時間限制。所以。
B.en: Incorrect. Direct Connect provides a dedicated network connection that can improve data transmission speed and stability. However, setting up Direct Connect takes time (usually weeks to months) and cannot meet the 2-week time limit in the question. Therefore.

C.zh: 正確。Snowball Edge 是用於大規模資料遷移的實體裝置。使用者可以將資料寫入設備，然後將設備傳輸到AWS進行資料導入。適用於大規模資料遷移（如50 TB），不依賴現有網路連接，因此可以繞過VPN頻寬限制。此外，Snowball Edge可以在短時間內完成資料遷移，滿足2週的時間要求。因此，該選項是正確的。
C.en: Correct. Snowball Edge is a physical device used for large-scale data migration. Users can write data to the device and then transport the device to AWS for data import. It is suitable for large-scale data migration (such as 50 TB) and does not rely on existing network connections, so it can bypass VPN bandwidth limitations. In addition, Snowball Edge can complete data migration in a short time, meeting the 2-week time requirement. Therefore, this option is correct.

D.zh: 錯誤。Storage Gateway 是一種混合式雲端儲存服務，主要用於與 AWS 儲存傳輸本機資料。通常用於持續的資料同步，而不是一次性的大規模資料遷移。另外，它依賴現有的網路連線（例如VPN），無法滿足問題中50TB的資料遷移要求。所以。
D.en: Incorrect. Storage Gateway is a hybrid cloud storage service, mainly used to transfer local data with AWS storage. It is often used for continuous data synchronization rather than one-time large-scale data migration. In addition, it relies on existing network connections (such as VPN) and cannot meet the 50 TB data migration requirement in the question. Therefore.

answer_text.zh: C. AWS Snowball 邊緣儲存最佳化
answer_text.en: C. AWS Snowball Edge Storage Optimized

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (95%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Snowball Edge 是用於大規模資料遷移的實體裝置。使用者可以將資料寫入設備，然後將設備傳輸到AWS進行資料導入。適用於大規模資料遷移（如50 TB），不依賴現有網路連接，因此可以繞過VPN頻寬限制。此外，Snowball Edge可以在短時間內完成資料遷移，滿足2週的時間要求。因此，該選項是正確的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (95%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Snowball Edge is a physical device used for large-scale data migration. Users can write data to the device and then transport the device to AWS for data import. It is suitable for large-scale data migration (such as 50 TB) and does not rely on existing network connections, so it can bypass VPN bandwidth limitations. In addition, Snowball Edge can complete data migration in a short time, meeting the 2-week time requirement. Therefore, this option is correct.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 Auto Scaling 群組中的 Amazon EC2 隨選執行個體上託管應用程式。申請高峰時間出現在每天的同一時間。應用程式使用者報告在高峰時段開始時應用程式效能緩慢。該應用程式在高峰時段開始後 2-3 小時內正常運作。該公司希望確保該應用程式在高峰時段開始時正常運作。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts an application on Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances in an Auto Scaling group. Application peak hours occur at the same time each day. Application users report slow application performance at the start of peak hours. The application performs normally 2-3 hours after peak hours begin. The company wants to ensure that the application works properly at the start of peak hours. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 設定應用程式負載平衡器以將流量正確分配到執行個體。
A.en: Configure an Application Load Balancer to distribute traffic properly to the instances.

B.zh: 為 Auto Scaling 群組配置動態擴充策略，以根據記憶體使用率啟動新執行個體。
B.en: Configure a dynamic scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group to launch new instances based on memory utilization.

C.zh: 為 Auto Scaling 群組配置動態擴充策略，以根據 CPU 使用率啟動新執行個體。
C.en: Configure a dynamic scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group to launch new instances based on CPU utilization.

D.zh: 為 Auto Scaling 群組配置計畫的擴充策略，以在高峰時段之前啟動新執行個體。
D.en: Configure a scheduled scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group to launch new instances before peak hours.

A.zh: 錯誤。負載平衡雖然可以幫助分發流量，但並不能解決高峰期實例桶啟動慢的問題。此選項與問題中所述的效能問題無關。
A.en: Incorrect. Although Application Load Balancer can help distribute traffic, it does not solve the problem of slow bucket startup of instances during peak times. this option is not related to the performance issue described in the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。基於記憶體使用的動態擴容策略，在高峰時段可能會導致實例在桶啟動後才啟動，無法提前應對流量高峰。問題是要在峰值桶開始之前解決性能問題，而動態伸縮可以滿足這個要求。
B.en: Incorrect. The dynamic expansion strategy based on memory usage may cause the instance to be started after the bucket has started during peak hours, making it impossible to cope with traffic peaks in advance. The problem is to solve performance problems before the peak bucket starts, and dynamic scaling can meet this requirement.

C.zh: 錯誤。與選項B類似，基於CPU使用率的動態伸縮策略可能會導致執行個體僅在峰值桶啟動後才啟動。 Stripeless提前響應流量高峰，高峰時段啟動桶時用戶仍會遇到效能問題。
C.en: Incorrect. Similar to option B, the dynamic scaling strategy based on CPU usage may cause instances to be started only after the peak bucket has started. Stripeless responds to traffic peaks in advance, and users will still encounter performance issues when buckets start during peak times.

D.zh: 正確。計劃的擴展策略允許在計劃的時間啟動新實例，確保實例在峰值桶開始之前準備好處理流量。該選項完美地解決了該問題，並解決了用戶在高峰時段啟動分桶時遇到的效能問題。
D.en: Correct. The scheduled scaling policy allows new instances to be launched at scheduled times, ensuring that instances are ready to handle traffic before peak buckets begin. this option fits the problem perfectly and solves the performance issues users experienced when bucketing started during peak times.

answer_text.zh: D. 為 Auto Scaling 群組配置計畫的擴充策略，以在高峰時段之前啟動新執行個體。
answer_text.en: D. Configure a scheduled scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group to launch new instances before peak hours.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：計劃的擴展策略允許在計劃的時間啟動新實例，確保實例在峰值桶開始之前準備好處理流量。該選項完美地解決了該問題，並解決了用戶在高峰時段啟動分桶時遇到的效能問題。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The scheduled scaling policy allows new instances to be launched at scheduled times, ensuring that instances are ready to handle traffic before peak buckets begin. this option fits the problem perfectly and solves the performance issues users experienced when bucketing started during peak times.
